spells.name: SPECTRAL CHAINS
spells.effect:
Range: 10"

Target Fighter may immediately be moved up to 6” by the Conjuring Warlock’s Player.

Power Surge (CV 11): Target also suffers D3 MW if it repositions in it's own activation this turn.

spells.name: LIGHTNING BOLT
spells.effect:
Range: —

Target suffers D3+2 MW.

Power Surge (MV 10): D3+3 MW.

leaderAbilities.name: Whispers of the Warp
leaderAbilities.effect: Whenever an opponent activates a Fighter within 6", roll a D6. If the result is higher than that Fighter’s AP, it loses 1 AP for this activation.
